description_long: This house features a modern, rectangular layout with a flat roof and clean, minimalist lines. The exterior is predominantly light gray with several large windows, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. There is a small, partially enclosed porch or deck area at one end, likely serving as the main entryway, and a section of the house appears to have a slightly recessed or stepped design. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, with some grouped together and others spaced apart, contributing to a contemporary aesthetic. The roof is flat, with no visible overhangs or decorative elements, emphasizing the modern architectural style. The house appears to be a single-story structure, suitable for urban or suburban neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, light gray exterior, and large asymmetrical windows. Features a small porch or deck and a minimalist, rectangular design.
description_view_0: This view shows the house's main facade with large windows, the entry porch, and the overall rectangular shape.
description_view_1: From this angle, the flat roof and the stepped or recessed section of the house are more visible, along with additional windows.
description_view_2: This side view highlights the elongated shape of the house, the flat roof, and a cluster of windows near one end.
description_view_3: The rear or opposite end of the house is visible here, showing a continuation of the flat roof and a small deck or entry area.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple entry with a small porch or deck, minimal steps, and no decorative columns or overhangs
